description: An event organizer calls to confirm that the tables and chairs they requested for their event have been set up.

nodes.task_description: Identify the event from the event management system using the organizer's name and event date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the 'Annual Job Fair' event record.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the associated facilities work order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the work order for the setup is marked as 'Completed'.

nodes.task_description: Confirm to the organizer that the setup has been completed by the facilities team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear confirmation to the event organizer.
